wrong_semantics_path: dashboard_server._stream_positions_mark previously special-cased BUY_NO as (entry_px - current_price) * qty while still computing live_equity as qty * current_price
relation_to_bos_yes_incident: related family, but separate immediate bug: BOS/MIL was wrong held-side team semantics in close pricing interpretation; SEA/TEX was BUY_NO unrealized sign inversion in dashboard/SSE math
minimum_fix_applied: Removed BUY_NO special-case sign inversion in dashboard_server._stream_positions_mark so all baseball open positions use one held-contract formula based on current held contract price
live_proof_summary: After the fix, open-position SSE/dashboard math uses the same current held price for both live_equity and unrealized. For SEA/TEX BUY_NO, a rise in held NO contract price now implies both higher equity and positive unrealized, not opposite signs.
